LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.S. SECURITY ASSOCIATES INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS GRANTED. MR. CATO FAILED TO PROPERLY SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT U.S. SECURITY ASSOCIATES INC. EFFECTING SERVICE ON A CORPORATION REQUIRES DELIVERY OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT TO A PERSON ON BEHALF OF THE CORPORATION (E.G. AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CHARLETON PEARSE, ESQ., 916.443.1030, FOR DEFENDANT U.S. SECURITY ASSOCIATES; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK CATO's Motion For Judgment is denied. The Court (Department 306) already entered judgment against plaintiff. In addition, plaintiff appears to be seeking a default judgment but this department does not handle such requests. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Adam M. Ambrozy, Esq., of Lenahan, Lee, Slater & Pearse, Tel. 916.443.1030, specially appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Mark Cato, Tel. 415.678.9688, plaintiff (appearing on his behalf) and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT U.S. SECURITY ASSOCIATES INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Granted. Mr. Cato failed to properly serve the Summons and Complaint on defendant U.S. Security Associates Inc. Effecting service on a corporation requires delivery of the Summons and Complaint to a person on behalf of the corporation (e.g. authorized agent for service of process). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT WAS CALLING ATTY. CHARLETON PEARSE IN OPEN COURT BUT WAS UNABLE TO DO SO.
